Data Sources & Methodology
OSINT Only  ·  No Gov. Affiliation  ·  Fully Transparent
Red Dragon Tracker
DATA SOURCES · METHODOLOGY · TRANSPARENCY NOTICE
What Is This Platform?

Red Dragon Tracker is an open-source intelligence (OSINT) dashboard that aggregates and visualises publicly available data about China's military posture, geopolitical activity, economic indicators, and human rights situation. It is built for researchers, journalists, policy professionals, and informed citizens.

It has no government affiliation, does not use classified information, and makes no claim to represent official intelligence assessments. Every data point is traceable to a named public source.

Live & Real-Time Data Sources LIVE
Aircraft Tracking
ADS-B Exchange / airplanes.live
Civilian Mode-S transponder data (ADS-B). Military aircraft without transponders are not shown. Positions update every 5–10 seconds via airplanes.live API.
Seismic Activity
USGS Earthquake Hazards Program
Magnitude 2.5+ earthquakes globally, updated in near real time from the USGS GeoJSON feed. Data reflects seismic events only — not nuclear tests.
Space Station
TLE · ivanstanojevic.me · SGP4
Tiangong CSS position calculated from Two-Line Element sets (NORAD 48274) using SGP4 orbital propagation. Updated every 10 seconds.
Air Quality
World Air Quality Index (WAQI)
AQI readings for major Chinese cities via the WAQI API, sourced from EPA monitoring stations. Cached for 30 minutes. Scale: US EPA AQI standard.
airplanes.live USGS Earthquakes TLE API WAQI
News Intelligence Feeds LIVE

All news content is fetched from RSS feeds of established media organisations. China-specific feeds are used in full; general world news feeds are filtered to articles containing relevant keywords (China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Xi Jinping, Xinjiang, etc.). Articles are deduplicated and sorted by publication time.

China-Dedicated Feeds
BBC · The Guardian · SCMP · Global Times
All articles from China-focused RSS feeds are included. Note: Global Times is a CPC-affiliated outlet; its inclusion is for monitoring state media framing, not as an authoritative source.
Keyword-Filtered Feeds
Reuters · AP · NPR · Al Jazeera · Nikkei · FT
Broad world-news RSS feeds filtered to China-related articles. Cached for 5 minutes; auto-refreshed when the News panel is open.
BBC China RSS SCMP RSS Reuters RSS AP RSS
Economic & Statistical Data OSINT
GDP, Trade, Debt
World Bank Open Data API
GDP, trade balance, and external debt figures sourced live from the World Bank API (api.worldbank.org). Data typically reflects the most recently published annual figures.
Official Statistics
NBS China (National Bureau of Statistics)
Selected figures from stats.gov.cn English edition, proxied server-side. Chinese official statistics should be interpreted with awareness of known methodological debates (e.g. GDP deflator controversies).
Stock Markets
TradingView Widget
Live price charts for HSI, CSI 300, SHCOMP, and related instruments. Data and execution provided by TradingView; this platform offers no financial advice.
BRI / Debt Diplomacy
AidData · Rhodium Group · IMF
Chinese overseas lending and BRI investment figures drawn from AidData's Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset, Rhodium Group research, and IMF Article IV consultations.
World Bank API NBS China AidData Rhodium Group
Geopolitical Intelligence OSINT

Military order-of-battle data, base locations, weapons systems, and force structure estimates are drawn from open-source analyses by recognised research organisations and declassified government documents.

Cyber Threats
CISA · NSA · Mandiant · MITRE ATT&CK
APT group profiles and incident data sourced from public CISA advisories, NSA cybersecurity guidance, Mandiant threat intelligence reports, and MITRE ATT&CK group entries.
Surveillance & Detention
ASPI · Citizen Lab · HRW · UN OHCHR
Xinjiang facility data from ASPI's Xinjiang Data Project (satellite verified). Internet censorship research from Citizen Lab. Detention and rights-violation documentation from Human Rights Watch and the UN OHCHR 2022 Xinjiang report.
Military & Arms
SIPRI · DoD China Report · IISS
Military expenditure and arms transfer data from SIPRI. Order-of-battle estimates cross-referenced with annual DoD "Military and Security Developments Involving the PRC" report and IISS Military Balance.
Tension Meter
Live news signal + historical baseline
The geopolitical tension meter scores keyword frequency across live news articles against a set of compound-phrase signals (each phrase has a calibrated weight). Score = weighted sum normalised to 0–10. Not a predictive model — reflects current news coverage intensity.
CISA China ASPI Xinjiang Citizen Lab SIPRI DoD PRC Report Freedom House
Internet Freedom & Censorship Context OSINT

China operates the world's most extensive internet censorship system, commonly known as the "Great Firewall." The following organisations publish ongoing, peer-reviewed research on China's censorship apparatus, surveillance technology exports, and press freedom.

Citizen Lab · China Research Freedom on the Net 2024 CPJ · Press Freedom RSF · China HRW · Free Speech ChinaFile
Disclaimer

Red Dragon Tracker is an independent OSINT project. It is not affiliated with any government, intelligence agency, political party, or advocacy organisation. Data is presented for informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes investment advice, legal advice, or an official threat assessment.

Simulated visualisations (cyberattack animations, military exercise patterns) are illustrative of documented patterns — they are not live operational data. ADS-B aircraft data excludes transponder-off flights. Tension scores reflect news volume, not classified intelligence.

All trademarks, media logos, and source names belong to their respective owners. Source links are provided for reference and do not imply endorsement by those organisations of this platform.
